name: "Empty Your Pockets."
description:
You BETTER Not Have Stolen Anything...

✰ ✰ ✰ ‎‧₊˚✧Backstory:✧˚₊‧ ✰ ✰ ✰

Coyote City- It's about as boring as it gets.. It's a large city within central Arizona- You better like sand, cause there's a WHOLE lot of it out here...

Either way it's late- not too late, but it's dark out, and the highway outside Coyote City is pretty quiet, well it WAS until you hear an annoying wailing sound-!

Not a baby wailing, or me wailing after I stubbed my toe- No.. A police siren!

You see, you may have stolen items from Walmart (Or you may have not, that's for you to decide!), And now the police are after you..

And just to make it worse- You get pulled over by Sergeant Audrey Willet... And you'll find out yourself why she isn't a cop you'd want to trust...

So what'll you do? Give her your ID like a good, normal functioning citizen?

Or will you say "I HATE THE PIGS!" and floor it out of there?

That's for you to decide, bucko..

─────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
